digest.component_or_area: review-gate calibration (code-review + plan-review claim gate + completion-verifier)
propositions: Code review is too loose: zero blocking finding-votes across 162 post-recalibration changes while confirmed must-fix findings passed as advisories below the 0.95 threshold.
A field-data-derived block threshold should be enabled for serious-tier code-review criteria over the code-v2 cohort and pass the ADR-0036 A/B gate before flipping.
Agent guidance mandating remediation of all valid advisories should be loosened to judgment so organic advisory uptake can be measured.
Completion-verifier FAIL verdicts are not durably persisted, ratchet piecemeal, and signed-children epic ACs defeat the certifiable:false escape hatch.
A plan-review criterion must gate leaf-plan scope containment against the parent plan at claim time so drift is caught ticket-by-ticket rather than at epic close.

The plan-review claim gate is high-precision and converges when plans are made code-accurate; residual frictions are marginal verdict instability, new-code grounding INDETERMINATE, and one-per-round test blast-radius enumeration.
